chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3906 of 2013 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of CMA No.10516/2014 (U/o.9 R-9) 24.08.2021 Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, Addl.A.G. ------ None present for the petitioner. There is no intimation; therefore, instant application is dismissed on account of non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE
